feat.name: Nature's Precision
feat.prerequisite: *Beastmaster Dedication*; animal companion with an *agile* or *finesse* unarmed attack
feat.text: Your companions pick at an enemy's weak points. When your companion strikes a off-guard creature with an agile or finesse unarmed attack, it deals an additional 1d4 precision damage (2d4 if the animal companion is specialized). If the companion already deals precision damage, combine the precision damage.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
